description: Yankho lanu limatithandiza kukonza zonse za chikondwererochi.
Your reply helps us organize every detail of the celebration.
namePlaceholder: Lowetsani dzina lanu loyamba ndi lomaliza
Enter your first and last name
allergiesHint: Zingosonyeza kuti sangagwirizane ndi zakudya komanso kusalolera.
Only indicate food allergies and intolerances.
privacyConsent: I have been informed and I accept the <link>Privacy Policy</link>
healthConsent: Ndikuvomereza kukonzanso thanzi langa deta (chifuwa ndi tsankho) kuti azolowere ukwati menyu
I consent to the processing of my health data (allergies and intolerances) to adapt the wedding menu
alreadySubmitted: You have already confirmed your attendance
ageUnder14Warning: You are under 14 years of age.
parentalConsent: Makolo anga kapena ondisamalira amavomereza kuti nditenge nawo mbali
My parents or guardians consent to my participation

nameRequired: Lowetsani dzina lanu kuti mutsimikizire kupezekapo.
Enter your name to confirm attendance.
privacyRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy.
ageUnder14: You are under 14 years of age.
healthConsentRequired: Muyenera kuvomereza kukonzedwa kwa data yaumoyo wanu.
You must consent to the processing of your health data.
menuHeadcountRequired: Indicate at least one menu option.
guestNamesRequired: Enter the names of your companions.
guestNamesExceed: You cannot enter more names than companions.
headcountExceed: Kuchuluka kwa menyu sikungapitilire kuchuluka kwa ma bwenzi.
The sum of menu options cannot exceed the number of companions.

saveError: We could not save your response.
withdrawConfirm: Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa yankho lanu?
Are you sure you want to withdraw your response?
headcountHint: Ndi anthu angati pachosankha chilichonse ({{chiwerengero}} chonse)
How many people for each option ({{total}} total)
guestNamesHint: Lembani dzina loyamba ndi lomaliza la mzanu aliyense (max {{count}})
Write the first and last name of each companion (max {{count}})

notFoundText: We couldn't find an invitation with this link.
emptyText: Pangani ndikugawana kuyitanidwa kwanu kwaukwati komwe mumakonda.
Create and share your personalized wedding invitation.
emptyDescription: Konzani zambiri zakuyitanira kwanu, gawani ulalo wapadera ndi alendo anu, ndikulandila ma RSVP awo.
Manage your invitation details, share a unique link with your guests, and receive their RSVPs.
mapPreviewAlt: Map preview at the indicated location.

loadingText: We are loading your saved data.
successText: Deta yanu yasungidwa ndipo kuyitanidwa kulipo tsopano.
Your data has been saved and the invitation is now available.
godparentsHint: If you enter one name, the other is also required.
backgroundText: Kwezani chithunzi kapena sankhani maziko achikuto.
Upload a photo or choose a background for the cover.
couplePhotoHint: Photo of the couple for the cover.
audioHint: Kwezani fayilo yomvera kuti muzisewera pachikuto (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A — max 5 MB).
Upload an audio file to play on the cover (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A — max 5 MB).
audioUploadSubtitle: MP3, WAV, OGG kapena M4A - max 5 MB
MP3, WAV, OGG or M4A — max 5 MB
audioSizeError: Fayilo yomvera imadutsa malire a 5 MB.
Audio file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
placePlaceholder: Lembani dzina la malo kuti mufufuze...
Type the venue name to search...
placeHint: Type the venue and select from the results.
scheduleHint: Lembani ndandanda, mzere umodzi pa chochitika.
Write the schedule, one line per event.
dressCodeHint: Select the dress code for the celebration.
accommodationHint: Mahotela, ma code ochotsera ndi zosankha za alendo.
Hotels, discount codes and options for guests.
transportHint: Zosankha zamayendedwe, nthawi zamabasi, kuyimitsidwa, ndi zina.
Transport options, bus schedules, parking, etc.
kidsHint: Sankhani ndondomeko ya ana ya chikondwererocho.
Select the children policy for the celebration.
menuRequiredText: Zofunikira: mchere komanso menyu yayikulu imodzi.
Required: dessert and at least one main menu.
menuTextoPlaceholder: Fotokozani menyu: zoyambira, maphunziro apamwamba, mchere ...
Describe the menu: starter, main course, dessert...
menuTextoHint: Describe the menu you have prepared.
storyHint: Mawu aulere onena za nkhani yanu yachikondi.
Free text about your love story.
giftsInfoHint: Onetsani ngati mukufuna mphatso zandalama, nambala ya akaunti, ndi zina.
Indicate if you prefer cash gifts, account number, etc.
bankInfoHint: Nambala ya akaunti yosamutsa, ngati ikuyenera.
Account number for transfers, if applicable.
privacyConsent: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
setup.galleryTrimmed: {{max}} of {{selected}} images will be uploaded (gallery limit).

loadingConfig: We are retrieving your saved configuration.

restoreInvalid: The file does not have the expected format.

noResultsFilter: Palibe zotsatira zomwe zapezeka ndi fyulutayi.
No results found with this filter.

description: Gwiritsani ntchito gawoli kuti mupange khodi yatsopano.
Use this section to generate a new code.
newTokenPlaceholder: Press «Generate» to create a new code
activeToken: Active code (only you can see it).
currentTokenDescription: Kuti mupange khodi yatsopano, lowetsani nambala yomwe muli nayo pano.
To generate a new code, enter the current access code.

deleteDataDescription: Ngati mukufuna kugwiritsa ntchito ufulu wanu woteteza deta, mutha kuchotsa deta yanu yonse.
If you wish to exercise your data protection rights, you can delete all your data.
deleteInvitation: Chotsani kuyitanidwa kwanga ndi data yanga yonse
Delete my invitation and all my data

title: Thandizo
Support
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
description: Ngati muli ndi zovuta kapena mafunso okhudza kuitanirako, mutha kulumikizana ndi wopanga:
If you have any issues or questions about the invitation, you can contact the developer:
rightsDescription: Mutha kupempha kufufutidwa kapena kutumiza deta yanu nthawi iliyonse malinga ndi dera lanu (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA kapena POPIA).
You can request the deletion or export of your personal data at any time according to your jurisdiction (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA or POPIA).
rightsHint: Makasitomala anu a imelo adzatsegula ndi template yodzazidwa kale.
Your email client will open with a pre-filled template.
ccpaText: Wedingo does not sell personal data.
appDescription: Web application for managing wedding invitations.

title: Chilolezo cha cookie
Cookie consent
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
text: Wedingo amagwiritsa ntchito zosungirako zakomweko zofunika kuti mayitanidwe agwire ntchito (kusunga gawo lanu ndi zomwe mumakonda).
Wedingo uses local storage necessary for the invitation to function (saving your session and preferences).

termsText: Pogwiritsa ntchito Wedingo mumavomereza mawu awa.
By using Wedingo you accept these terms.
legalText: Potsatira malamulo ogwiritsidwa ntchito, mfundo zotsatirazi zimaperekedwa:
In compliance with applicable laws, the following information is provided:

verifyTokenFirst: Verify the access code before saving.
acceptPrivacyPolicy: Muyenera kuvomereza Zazinsinsi kuti mupange kuyitanira.
You must accept the Privacy Policy to create the invitation.
usernameRequired: Lowetsani dzina lolowera kuti mudzalowenso pambuyo pake.
Enter a username so you can log in later.
usernameInvalid: Dzina lolowera litha kukhala ndi zilembo ndi manambala okha.
Username can only contain letters and numbers.
bothNamesRequired: Lowetsani mayina onse awiri kuti mupitilize.
dayInvalid: Tsiku liyenera kukhala pakati pa 1 ndi 31.
hourInvalid: Ola liyenera kukhala pakati pa 0 ndi 23.
minuteInvalid: Mphindi ziyenera kukhala pakati pa 00 ndi 59.
dateNotValid: Tsiku lomwe lalowetsedwa silovomerezeka (monga February 30 kulibe).
The date entered is not valid (e.g. February 30 does not exist).
dateBeforeToday: The wedding date cannot be before today.
yearTooFar: The year cannot be later than {{year}}.
sectionOrderInvalid: The section order is not valid.
hiddenSectionsInvalid: The hidden sections are not valid.
godparentsRequired: Ngati mulowetsa godparent imodzi, mayina onsewa amafunikira.
If you enter one godparent, both names are required.
coverFirst: The cover must be the first section.
menuRequired: Fotokozani zosachepera chakudya chimodzi (nyama, nsomba kapena vegan).
Describe at least one main menu (meat, fish or vegan).
ibanInvalid: The IBAN format is not valid.
galleryFormatInvalid: The gallery image format is not valid.
sectionOrderMismatch: Gawoli lili ndi zinthu {{actual}}, koma {{expected}} zinali zoyembekezeredwa.
The section order has {{actual}} items, but {{expected}} were expected.
messageTooLong: The invitation message cannot exceed 500 characters.
giftsTooLong: The gift information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
transportTooLong: The transport information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
invalidLink: The invitation link is not valid.
accommodationTooLong: Zambiri za malo ogona sizingadutse zilembo 2000.
readImageFailed: Could not read the image file.
imageTooLarge: Chithunzichi ndi chachikulu kwambiri ngakhale mutapanikizana.
The image is too large even after compression.

superadmin.expiredInvitations: {{count}} invitation(s) over 12 months past the wedding date
expiredText: Malinga ndi mfundo zachinsinsi, datayi imayenera kuchotsedwa yokha.
According to the privacy policy, this data should have been automatically deleted.
noResultsFilter: Palibe maitanidwe omwe apezeka ndi izi.
No invitations found with that criteria.
noTokensToClean: Palibe zizindikiro zosagwiritsidwa ntchito kuti ziyeretse.
firebaseAccount: Kuti muyang'anire akaunti yanu ya superadmin, gwiritsani ntchito konsoni ya Firebase:
To manage your superadmin account, use the Firebase console:

deletedOne: Kuyitana {{token}} kwafufutidwa ndi data yake yonse.
Invitation {{token}} deleted with all its data.

title: Mbiri ya ntchito zokonza (Art. 30 GDPR)
Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
updated: Zasinthidwa: Julayi 2026. Zolemba izi zikuwonetsa zochitika zakusintha kwa data yanu ku Wedingo.
Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
row1Data: Mayina apabanja, tsiku, malo, mutu, zithunzi, nyimbo, menyu, magawo
Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
row2Data: Dzina la alendo, opezekapo (inde/ayi), kusankha menyu, ziwengo, zambiri zaumoyo
Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
row2Purpose: Sinthani mndandanda wa alendo ndi menyu
row4Data: Chizindikiro cha gawo, dzina lolowera la admin
row4Purpose: Sinthani mwayi wopita ku gulu la admin
Control access to the admin panel
row5Data: Zochita za Superadmin, zizindikiro zogwiritsidwa ntchito, zoyitanira zochotsedwa
Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
internationalText: Zambiri zimasungidwa pa seva za Google Cloud m'chigawo cha eur3 (Frankfurt, Germany).
Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany).
scc: Magawo Okhazikika a Contractual (SCC) - Kukhazikitsa Chigamulo cha 2021/914
dpf: Dongosolo Lazinsinsi Zazidziwitso (DPF) EU-US, UK-US ndi Switzerland-US
Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
measureEncryption: AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
measureTls: HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
measureFirestore: Malamulo achitetezo a Firestore (kuwongolera kofikira pagawo)
measureStorage: Malo ocheperako am'deralo ndi chilolezo chokha
Minimal local storage with consent only
measureRetention: Ndondomeko yosungira: Miyezi 12 pambuyo pa chochitika cha data ya alendo
Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
measureSuperadmin: Superadmin yotetezedwa ndi Firebase Authentication + njira yobisika
Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

godparentsText: With the blessing of their godparents
celebrationMessage: We look forward to sharing this special moment with you.
scheduleFallback: The detailed schedule will be shared soon.
storyFallback: The story will be shared soon.
bestGift: Kukhalapo kwanu ndi mphatso yabwino koposa
Your presence is the best gift
giftsFallback: Gift information will be shared soon.
accommodationFallback: Zambiri za malo ogona zidzagawidwa posachedwa.

sessionExists: There is already an active session for this invitation.
tokenInvalid: The access code is not valid.
enterUserAndCode: Lowetsani dzina lanu lolowera ndi nambala yolowera.
Enter your username and the access code.
codeUserMismatch: The code does not match this user.

usernameInvalid: Dzina lolowera litha kukhala ndi zilembo ndi manambala okha.

unauthorizedUser: This user does not have permission to access here.

superadminNoPermissions: This account does not have administration permissions.
superadminInvalidEmail: The email format is not valid.

invitationText: Tikuyembekezera kukondwerera nthawi yapaderayi ndi inu.
We look forward to celebrating this special moment with you.

golden: Zokongola komanso zowala, zokhala ndi mawu agolide.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Natural ndi wofatsa ndi zofewa amadyera.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Wofunda komanso wosakhwima, wokhala ndi mitundu ya pinki.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Kuwala ndi kusalowerera ndale, ndi kukhalapo kwamtendere komanso kosatha.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Zofewa komanso zachikondi, zokhala ndi ma toni apinki.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: Zatsopano komanso zosalala, zokhala ndi lavender ndi mitundu ya mauve.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: Zowala komanso zosangalatsa, zonyezimira zotentha zagolide.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Zamdima komanso zokongola, zokhala ndi zowoneka bwino za amber ndi golide.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: Wakuya komanso wotsogola, wokhala ndi golide wambiri pamdima wakuda.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Buluu wakuda kwambiri wokhala ndi golide wozama komanso kupezeka koyenera.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: Kutentha ndi kuphimba, ndi vinyo wofiira ndi golide wonyezimira.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Buluu wakuya wokhala ndi katchulidwe ka siliva komanso kupezeka mwabata.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Zobiriwira zakuya zachilengedwe zokhala ndi golide komanso zokongola.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Chofiirira kwambiri chokhala ndi pinki komanso zonyezimira zachikondi.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Chikondwerero cha chikondi chosiyanasiyana ndi mitundu ya utawaleza.
Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Buluu, pinki ndi zoyera polemekeza mbendera ya trans.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Chikasu, choyera, chofiirira ndi chakuda kwa mbendera yosakhala ya binary.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: Orange, yoyera ndi pinki ya mbendera ya amuna kapena akazi okhaokha.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Pinki, wofiirira ndi buluu wa mbendera bi.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: Pinki, chikasu ndi buluu pa mbendera ya pan.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Wakuda, wotuwa, woyera ndi wofiirira wa mbendera ya asexual.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.
